describe what makes you a right fit for: I am a full-stack developer with experience in building practical web and mobile apps. I have worked on various projects, including AI-powered form filling agents and GitHub reviewers. My skills in programming languages such as Python, TypeScript, and JavaScript make me a strong fit for this role.
elaborate your experience on building ai: I have experience building AI agents using LangChain and LangGraph. I built a Form Filling Agent that uses LLMs with structured prompts and workflow control to understand user input and automatically fill complex web forms, along with a browser extension for real usage. I also developed a Student GitHub Reviewer that uses LLMs to analyze GitHub profiles and generate structured feedback. I worked on prompt design, chaining, and managing agent workflows using LangGraph, which helped me understand how to integrate LLMs with real-world pipelines.
rger: I have worked as a Frontend Developer Intern at Gistly AI and am currently contributing to the Carmaacarcare mobile app, building user-focused features used by 1000+ active users.
